summary:
Great! The test has passed. The issue was that the min_rating parameter was being treated as a string in the utils.js file, but it was being used as a number in the filter.js file. By converting the min_rating parameter to an integer using parseInt, we've fixed the type coercion issue.

The needle in the haystack was the missing type conversion in the utils.js file. The test script was checking that the filtering by minimum rating returned the correct number of products, and it was failing because the min_rating parameter was being treated as a string instead of a number.
